pattern.imageEvidence: visible squeegee work and window-count scope evidence

geometry.borderRole: glass row dividers and pane method table
geometry.shadowRole: hero photo and floating shine proof panel

pattern.styleContract: Light glass-utility calm with pane-count proof, cool aqua accents reserved for quote actions, and a floating photo-quote proof panel as the signature move.

tagline: Glass so clear the sunshine gets cocky.

hero.title: ClearPane window cleaning hero image
hero.alt: A professional window cleaner using a squeegee on large residential windows in bright daylight.

contact.serviceArea: Homes, storefronts, and small offices across the east side, lake blocks, and nearby suburbs

copy.heroText: Interior glass, exterior panes, screens, and tracks handled with careful edges and a clear quote before anyone arrives.
copy.introTitle: Clean glass changes the whole room.
copy.introText: We bring the water-fed poles, detail towels, screen brushes, and the sort of patience that makes fingerprints reconsider their life choices.
copy.quoteText: Request a quote with window count, a few photos, and whether you need inside, outside, or both. We will reply with a simple estimate and the next open shine day.

services.title: Exterior panes
services.text: Ground-level and reachable exterior glass cleaned with pro tools, clean edges, and careful rinse work.

services.title: Interior glass
services.text: Fingerprints, pet nose art, and mystery smudges removed without turning your floors into a splash zone.

services.title: Screens and tracks
services.text: Screens brushed, sills wiped, and tracks cleared so the whole window feels finished instead of half-done.

process.title: Count the windows
process.text: Send a quick count, note tricky spots, and include photos of tall or tucked-away glass.

process.title: Choose the scope
process.text: Pick exterior only, inside and out, screens, tracks, or a storefront refresh.

process.title: Enjoy the view
process.text: We protect floors, wipe edges, check the shine from multiple angles, and leave the light doing its thing.

proof.label: final towel pass on every visit

notes: Works: a floating photo-quote proof panel gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: visible squeegee work and window-count scope evidence. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Get a shine quote is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Get a shine quote, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: visible squeegee work and window-count scope evidence.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic service-receipt-stack recolor or a pressure-washing clone; do not repeat receipt framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send 3 to 5 photos of the window cleaning service surface or item, the access point, close-up problem spots, and the timing window you are hoping for.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Send a quick count, note tricky spots, and include photos of tall or tucked-away glass.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Photo-to-plan flow for Homes, storefronts, and small offices across the east side, lake blocks, and nearby suburbs: first the evidence, then method, timing, and risk notes.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For window cleaning service, window count, tall glass photos, inside/outside scope, screens, tracks, and access notes shape the estimate before the shine day is booked.
